title: Camel Migration Specification
description: JSON Schema for validating Camel database migration YAML files.

up.description: The forward mutation block applied during migration.

down.description: The reverse mutation block applied during a rollback.

columnDefinition.markdownDescription:
Format: `type[:attribute] [modifier] [modifier:value] ...`

**Types:**
- `id` — unsigned bigInteger PK auto-increment
- `string[:N]` — VARCHAR(N), default 255
- `char[:N]` — CHAR(N), default 1
- `text` / `mediumText` / `longText`
- `integer` / `int` / `bigInteger` / `bigint`
- `smallInteger` / `smallint` / `tinyInteger`
- `boolean` / `bool`
- `decimal[:total,places]` — default 8,2
- `float` / `double`
- `date` / `time` / `dateTime` / `datetime`
- `timestamp`
- `json` / `jsonb`
- `binary` / `uuid`
- `enum:val1,val2,...`

**Modifiers:**
`nullable` `unique` `primary` `primary_key` `unsigned`
`autoIncrement` `auto_increment` `useCurrent`
`default:VALUE` or `default:'quoted value'`

**Examples:**
- `id: id`
- `title: string:150`
- `slug: string:180 unique`
- `price: decimal:10,2 default:0.00`
- `status: enum:draft,published default:'draft'`
- `is_active: boolean default:1`
- `created_at: timestamp useCurrent`
- `meta: json nullable`
- `token: uuid nullable`

action.description: The execution strategy for this specific table lifecycle block.

table.description: The name of the target database table. Defaults to the pluralized logical key when omitted.

indexes.description: Indexes to create alongside the table (action: create). Rendered as separate CREATE INDEX statements.

add_columns.description: New columns to introduce during action: alter.

modify_columns.description: Existing columns to retype or change nullability/default during action: alter. Not supported on SQLite — use action: raw there.

rename_columns.description: Column renames during action: alter. Key = current name, value = new name.

drop_columns.description: Columns to remove during action: alter.

foreign.description: Foreign keys declared inline during action: create. The only way to attach FKs in SQLite.

add_foreign.description: Foreign keys to add during action: alter. Not supported on SQLite.

drop_foreign.description: Constraint names to drop during action: alter. Not supported on SQLite.

add_indexes.description: Indexes to add during action: alter.

drop_indexes.description: Index names to drop during action: alter.

statements.description: Verbatim SQL statements for action: raw. Author owns dialect correctness.
